projectDescription: A free, open-source remote MCP server that transforms any GitHub repository or GitHub Pages site into an AI-accessible documentation hub, eliminating code hallucinations in AI coding assistants.
keyFeatures: Zero-setup remote MCP server for any public GitHub repository
Supports GitHub repositories (gitmcp.io/{owner}/{repo}) and GitHub Pages ({owner}.gitmcp.io/{repo})
Generic dynamic endpoint (gitmcp.io/docs) for on-demand repository access
Smart documentation search with AutoRAG (Cloudflare AI) and vector search fallback
Embedded in-browser chat for interacting with repository documentation
Repository view count badge for README files
Respects robots.txt directives for GitHub Pages
Deployed on Cloudflare Workers with KV caching and R2 storage
publicApiSurface: fetch_{repo}_documentation — Fetches primary documentation (llms.txt, README.md) for a specific repository
search_{repo}_documentation — Semantically searches repository documentation using AutoRAG or vector search
search_{repo}_code — Searches repository source code via GitHub Search API with pagination
fetch_generic_url_content — Fetches content from any absolute URL respecting robots.txt
fetch_generic_documentation — Generic endpoint: fetches docs for any owner/repo combination
search_generic_documentation — Generic endpoint: searches docs for any owner/repo combination
search_generic_code — Generic endpoint: searches code for any owner/repo combination
match_common_libs_owner_repo_mapping — Maps library names to GitHub owner/repo for generic endpoint
GET /badge/{owner}/{repo} — Returns shields.io-compatible badge with view count
